# title

**Instance Property**

The title of the identity picker.

## Declaration

```swift
var title: String? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The value of this property is the title text that appears at the top of the panel. By default, the title is “Select a person to share with:”.

## Setting and Getting Properties

- **allowsMultipleSelection**: A Boolean value indicating whether the user is allowed to select multiple identities.

items.description: A Boolean value indicating whether the user is allowed to select multiple identities.
items.name: allowsMultipleSelection
